controls.control_objective: To ensure 25, 2026) table of contents
controls.control_description:
भारतीय įरज़वर् बैंक

RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
RBI/DOR/2025-26/298 DOR.GOV.REC.No.217/18.10.015/2025-26 November 28, 2025
Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Governance) Directions,
2025 (Updated as on May 25, 2026)
Table of Contents
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 25, 2026) table of contents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as 'rcb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as 'RCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as 'rcb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks (collectively referred to as 'stcbs' and individually as 'stcb') and central co- operative banks (collectively referred
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'rural co-operative banks' shall mean State Co-operative Banks
(collectively referred to as 'StCBs' and individually as 'StCB') and Central Co-
operative Banks (collectively referred to as 'CCBs' and individually as 'CCB'), as
defined in the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks (collectively referred to as 'stcbs' and individually as 'stcb') and central co- operative banks (collectively referred

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'board' means the board of directors ('bod') or the governing body of an rcb, by whatever name called, t
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Board' means the Board of Directors ('BoD') or the governing body of an
RCB, by whatever name called, to which the direction and control of the
management of affairs of the RCB is entrusted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'board' means the board of directors ('bod') or the governing body of an rcb, by whatever name called, t

controls.control_objective: To ensure a director appointed on the board of an rcb, by way of election or co-option or in any other manner as per the applicable laws
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Director' means a director appointed on the Board of an RCB, by way of
election or co-option or in any other manner as per the applicable laws.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a director appointed on the board of an rcb, by way of election or co-option or in any other manner as per the applicable laws

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or any statutory m
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in common or
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or any statutory m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be knowledgeable and persons of high integrity
controls.control_description: The directors of an RCB should be knowledgeable and persons of high integrity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be knowledgeable and persons of high integrity

controls.control_objective: To ensure function in a cohesive manner and provide leadership for the smooth and efficient management of the affairs of the rcb
controls.control_description:
They must function in a cohesive manner and provide leadership for the smooth
and efficient management of the affairs of the RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to function in a cohesive manner and provide leadership for the smooth and efficient management of the affairs of the rcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to become directors of an rcb: (1) those who are not eligible for admission even as members (except co-opted and nominated directors)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to become directors of an rcb: (1) those who are not eligible for admission even as members (except co-opted and nominated directors)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to be re-appointed, whether by election or co- option or in any other manner, as a director on the board of the same rcb only after underg
controls.control_description:
A director on the Board of an RCB, after completing a continuous tenure of ten
years in office, shall be eligible to be re-appointed, whether by election or co-
option or in any other manner, as a director on the Board of the same RCB only
after undergoing a minimum cooling-off period of three years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to be re-appointed, whether by election or co- option or in any other manner, as a director on the board of the same rcb only after underg

controls.control_objective: To ensure be associated with the rcb in any capacity / manner other than as a member / customer
controls.control_description:
During the cooling-
off period, the said director shall not be associated with the RCB in any capacity
/ manner other than as a member / customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be associated with the rcb in any capacity / manner other than as a member / customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure preclude him / her from being appointed as a director on the board of another bank
controls.control_description:
This, however, shall not preclude
him / her from being appointed as a director on the Board of another bank, if
otherwise eligible.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preclude him / her from being appointed as a director on the board of another bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned
controls.control_description:
Explanation:
For calculating the period of continuous tenure, the total time served on the Board
of the RCB including the period of directorship preceding an interruption of less
than three years but excluding the period of directorship preceding at least a
three-year interruption shall be reckoned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned

controls.control_objective: To ensure have at least two directors with suitable banking experience (at middle / senior management level) or with relevant professional qualifications i
controls.control_description:
To ensure professionalism in the Board, an RCB shall have at least two directors
with suitable banking experience (at middle / senior management level) or with
relevant professional qualifications i.e., in areas of accountancy / banking /
1 Inserted with effect from May 25, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Governance) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated May 25, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have at least two directors with suitable banking experience (at middle / senior management level) or with relevant professional qualifications i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for, inter alia, (1) formulation of policies
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors of an RCB shall be responsible for, inter alia,
(1) formulation of policies;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for, inter alia, (1) formulation of policies

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all circulars and other material relating to policies issued by rbi / nabard are seen by every member of the board and also placed before
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall ensure that all circulars and other material relating to policies
issued by RBI / NABARD are seen by every member of the Board and also
placed before the Board for suitable action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all circulars and other material relating to policies issued by rbi / nabard are seen by every member of the board and also placed before

controls.control_objective: To ensure lay down a code of conduct for its directors on the board and senior management
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall lay down a Code of Conduct for its Directors on the Board and
Senior Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lay down a code of conduct for its directors on the board and senior management

controls.control_objective: To ensure include top executives at the level of general managers and functional heads
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Senior Management shall include top Executives at the level of
General Managers and functional heads.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include top executives at the level of general managers and functional heads

controls.control_objective: To ensure set forth the guiding principles on which an rcb will operate and conduct its daily business with its multitudinous stakeholders, government and regul
controls.control_description:
The Code of Conduct shall set forth the guiding principles on which an RCB will
operate and conduct its daily business with its multitudinous stakeholders,
government and regulatory agencies, media, and anyone else with whom it is
connected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set forth the guiding principles on which an rcb will operate and conduct its daily business with its multitudinous stakeholders, government and regul

controls.control_objective: To ensure recognize that the rcb is a trustee and custodian of public money and in order to fulfil its fiduciary obligations and responsibilities, it has to mai
controls.control_description:
It shall recognize that the RCB is a trustee and custodian of public
money and in order to fulfil its fiduciary obligations and responsibilities, it has to
maintain and continue to enjoy the trust and confidence of public at large.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recognize that the rcb is a trustee and custodian of public money and in order to fulfil its fiduciary obligations and responsibilities, it has to mai

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to initiate policies which are customer centric, and which promote financial prudence
controls.control_description:
The
RCB shall continue to initiate policies which are customer centric, and which
promote financial prudence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to initiate policies which are customer centric, and which promote financial prudence

controls.control_objective: To ensure be signed by the directors of an rcb in witness of rcs and nabard to ensure adherence
controls.control_description:
The Code of Conduct shall be signed by the Directors of an RCB in witness of
RCS and NABARD to ensure adherence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be signed by the directors of an rcb in witness of rcs and nabard to ensure adherence

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to do's and don'ts envisaged in the code of conduct as set out below: (1) corporate governance: the directors of an rcb should: explanation: th
controls.control_description:
The directors of an RCB shall adhere to Do's and Don'ts envisaged in the Code
of Conduct as set out below:
(1) Corporate Governance: The Directors of an RCB should:
Explanation: The Do's and Don'ts are illustrative and not exhaustive and are not to be
regarded as a substitute to the specified duties, responsibilities or rights of the Board
of Directors as enunciated in the Cooperative law and / or byelaws of the RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to do's and don'ts envisaged in the code of conduct as set out below: (1) corporate governance: the directors of an rcb should: explanation: th

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose their interest, well in advance, to the ceo and board
controls.control_description:
They should disclose their
interest, well in advance, to the CEO and Board;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose their interest, well in advance, to the ceo and board

controls.control_objective: To ensure fully disclose the nature of the related party transaction to the appropriate authority
controls.control_description:
Provided that, if such a related party transaction is unavoidable, they shall
fully disclose the nature of the related party transaction to the appropriate
authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to fully disclose the nature of the related party transaction to the appropriate authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted in such a way that no preferential treatment is given to that party
controls.control_description:
Any dealings with a related party must be conducted in such a
way that no preferential treatment is given to that party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted in such a way that no preferential treatment is given to that party

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after due deliberations, decide on its impact
controls.control_description:
In the case of any
other transaction or situation giving rise to conflicts of interests, the
appropriate authority should, after due deliberations, decide on its impact.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after due deliberations, decide on its impact

controls.control_objective: To ensure not:
controls.control_description:
<image>
(6) Maintain confidentiality: The directors of an RCB should not:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to not:

controls.control_objective: To ensure ordinarily be returned to the rcb after the meeting
controls.control_description:
The board
papers may ordinarily be returned to the RCB after the meeting;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ordinarily be returned to the rcb after the meeting

controls.control_objective: To ensure require for taking a decision should be made available by the executive
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require for taking a decision should be made available by the executive

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate their directorship of the rcb on their visiting card or letter head
controls.control_description:
However, a director may indicate their directorship of the RCB on
their visiting card or letter head.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate their directorship of the rcb on their visiting card or letter head

controls.control_objective: To ensure suitably modify the same as per their extant requirements
controls.control_description:
Explanation: RCB should suitably modify the same as per their extant
requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suitably modify the same as per their extant requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the board as per their prescribed periodicity: calendar of reviews periodicity: every board meeting (1) funds management
controls.control_description:
The following matters shall be put up to the Board as per their prescribed
periodicity:
Calendar of Reviews
Periodicity: Every Board meeting
(1) Funds Management
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the board as per their prescribed periodicity: calendar of reviews periodicity: every board meeting (1) funds management

controls.control_objective: To ensure be) under various lines of credit limits vis-a-vis the maximum borrowing power
controls.control_description:
etc., as the case may be) under various lines of credit
limits vis-a-vis the Maximum Borrowing Power;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be) under various lines of credit limits vis-a-vis the maximum borrowing power

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a fact sheet but should capture qualitative data on the important market trends, market developments, regulatory initiatives, etc
controls.control_description:
The report should not be a fact sheet but should capture
qualitative data on the important market trends, market developments,
regulatory initiatives, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a fact sheet but should capture qualitative data on the important market trends, market developments, regulatory initiatives, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure stimulate constructive suggestions and discussions on critical appraisal of the strategies followed presently and the need for changes
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stimulate constructive suggestions and discussions on critical appraisal of the strategies followed presently and the need for changes

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover requisite details on the deficiencies observed, systemic controls required for avoidance of incidence of npas, etc
controls.control_description:
The
report shall cover requisite details on the deficiencies observed, systemic
controls required for avoidance of incidence of NPAs, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover requisite details on the deficiencies observed, systemic controls required for avoidance of incidence of npas, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure also look at loan policy caveats on exposure thresholds, borrower-wise/ industry-wise, etc
controls.control_description:
During the review,
the Board shall also look at loan policy caveats on exposure thresholds,
borrower-wise/ industry-wise, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also look at loan policy caveats on exposure thresholds, borrower-wise/ industry-wise, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be highlighted
controls.control_description:
The RCB's
comparative position shall also be highlighted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be highlighted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a progress report on the steps initiated on the policy guidelines of rbi on prudential regulations, risk management, etc
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a progress report on the steps initiated on the policy guidelines of rbi on prudential regulations, risk management, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure include analysis of balance sheet prescribed by rbi
controls.control_description:
(i) Working results - Comparison of various parameters with working results of
other RCBs and should include analysis of Balance Sheet prescribed by RBI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include analysis of balance sheet prescribed by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a quarterly return to concerned regional office of nabard (as per the format in the annex) by the 10th of april / july / october / january in r
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall submit a quarterly return to concerned Regional Office of NABARD
(as per the format in the Annex) by the 10th of April / July / October / January in
respect of the status of submission of above agenda notes to the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a quarterly return to concerned regional office of nabard (as per the format in the annex) by the 10th of april / july / october / january in r

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up an independent audit committee at the board level for overseeing and providing direction to the internal audit / inspection machinery / statuto
controls.control_description:
In order to ensure and enhance the quality and effectiveness of internal audit /
inspection as a management tool, an RCB shall set up an independent Audit
Committee at the Board level for overseeing and providing direction to the
internal audit / inspection machinery / Statutory (external) Auditors and other
executives of the RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up an independent audit committee at the board level for overseeing and providing direction to the internal audit / inspection machinery / statuto

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that members of its audit committee are independent, understand banking and financial matters and have the capability to serve as effective audit committee members, including having the ability to formulate and ask probing questions about the rcb's financial reporting process and to challenge management decisions
controls.control_description:
Constitution of the Committee - The Board of Directors of an RCB shall ensure
that members of its Audit Committee are independent, understand banking and
financial matters and have the capability to serve as effective Audit Committee
members, including having the ability to formulate and ask probing questions
about the RCB's financial reporting process and to challenge management
decisions, if and when necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that members of its audit committee are independent, understand banking and financial matters and have the capability to serve as effective audit committee members, including having the ability to formulate and ask probing questions about the rcb's financial reporting process and to challenge management decisions

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that: (1) the committee comprises three or four directors only, one of whom shall act as the chairman of the committee
controls.control_description:
While constituting the Committee, an RCB
shall ensure that:
(1) the Committee comprises three or four directors only, one of whom shall act
as the Chairman of the Committee;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that: (1) the committee comprises three or four directors only, one of whom shall act as the chairman of the committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be co-opted
controls.control_description:
and
(3) one qualified locally available Chartered Accountant shall be co-opted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be co-opted

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint two or three members having expertise in banking, accountancy, finance, etc
controls.control_description:
Provided that, if the elected Board of an RCB has been superseded, the
Administrator shall appoint two or three members having expertise in banking,
accountancy, finance, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint two or three members having expertise in banking, accountancy, finance, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the chartered accountant as its chairman
controls.control_description:
for constitution of this Committee and such an Audit
Committee shall have the Chartered Accountant as its Chairman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the chartered accountant as its chairman

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given direct, unfettered, and independent access to management, internal audit, and statutory auditors
controls.control_description:
The Audit Committee shall be given direct, unfettered, and independent access
to management, internal audit, and statutory auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given direct, unfettered, and independent access to management, internal audit, and statutory auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be able to communicate in confidence with these three groups independently of each other
controls.control_description:
The Committee shall be
able to communicate in confidence with these three groups independently of
each other.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be able to communicate in confidence with these three groups independently of each other

controls.control_objective: To ensure assist the board of directors in fulfilling its oversight responsibilities by reviewing: <image> (1) the financial reports and other financial informa
controls.control_description:
Role of the Committee - The ACB of an RCB shall assist the Board of Directors
in fulfilling its oversight responsibilities by reviewing:
<image>
(1) the financial reports and other financial information provided by the RCB to
any statutory body or the public;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assist the board of directors in fulfilling its oversight responsibilities by reviewing: <image> (1) the financial reports and other financial informa

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) serve as a proactive, effective and objective mechanism to monitor the rcb's financial reporting process and internal control systems
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) serve as a proactive, effective and objective mechanism to monitor the rcb's financial reporting process and internal control systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure impact the independence of the auditors in carrying out the audit
controls.control_description:
(i) Recommend to the full Board for shareholder's approval, the appointment,
reappointment, removal, or replacement and terms of appointment of
auditors, and the fee payable to them for the audit, taking into consideration
any relationship between the auditors and the RCB that may impact the
independence of the auditors in carrying out the audit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impact the independence of the auditors in carrying out the audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure potentially conflict with the rcb's interests at large
controls.control_description:
(h) Disclosure of any related-party transaction, i.e., transactions of
the RCB with its Directors, senior executives, their relatives, or
associated concerns, that may potentially conflict with the RCB's
interests at large;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to potentially conflict with the rcb's interests at large

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at least once in a quarter
controls.control_description:
Meetings of the Committee - The audit committee shall meet at least once in a
quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet at least once in a quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at least half-yearly with management, the chief of the statutory auditing / inspection team and the department of accounts in separate sessions t
controls.control_description:
Besides, the Committee should meet at least half-yearly with
management, the chief of the statutory auditing / inspection team and the
department of accounts in separate sessions to discuss any matters that the
Committee or each of these groups believe should be discussed privately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet at least half-yearly with management, the chief of the statutory auditing / inspection team and the department of accounts in separate sessions t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the audit committees of an rcb at their corresponding periodicity: <image> (1) quarterly:
controls.control_description:
Calendar of Reviews - The following reviews shall be put up to the Audit
Committees of an RCB at their corresponding periodicity:
<image>
(1) Quarterly:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the audit committees of an rcb at their corresponding periodicity: <image> (1) quarterly:

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a risk management committee as a sub-committee of the board
controls.control_description:
In order to improve the ability to identify, measure, monitor and control the overall
level of risks it is exposed to, an RCB shall constitute a Risk Management
Committee as a Sub-Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a risk management committee as a sub-committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the constitution of a risk management committee by an rcb: (1) the committee shall include the ceo and heads of credit, investment, operation
controls.control_description:
Constitution of the Committee - The following instructions shall apply to the
constitution of a Risk Management Committee by an RCB:
(1) the Committee shall include the CEO and Heads of Credit, Investment,
Operational Risk departments, etc.;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the constitution of a risk management committee by an rcb: (1) the committee shall include the ceo and heads of credit, investment, operation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a special invitee to the meetings
controls.control_description: (2) the Head of IT Department shall be a special invitee to the meetings;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a special invitee to the meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sub-committees and support committees at the rcb's discretion
controls.control_description:
and
(3) there may be sub-committees and support committees at the RCB's
discretion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sub-committees and support committees at the rcb's discretion

controls.control_objective: To ensure : <image> (1) ensure a proper loan review mechanism is put in place for constantly evaluating the quality of credit portfolio and to bring out qualita
controls.control_description:
Role of the Committee - The Committee shall:
<image>
(1) ensure a proper Loan Review Mechanism is put in place for constantly
evaluating the quality of credit portfolio and to bring out qualitative
improvements in credit administration;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : <image> (1) ensure a proper loan review mechanism is put in place for constantly evaluating the quality of credit portfolio and to bring out qualita

controls.control_objective: To ensure require that the credit department reports to them any such exposure exceeding a specified limit or exposures to large borrowers
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to require that the credit department reports to them any such exposure exceeding a specified limit or exposures to large borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as being governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed
Directions/instructions/guidelines shall be deemed as being governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as being governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
